hsk3.explanation: Means 'My nose is small.' 鼻 means 'nose'.
Means 'I listen with my ears.' 耳 means 'ear'.
Means 'It is windy today.' 风 means 'wind'.
Means 'I like eating sugar.' 糖 means 'sugar'.
Means 'The river is long.' 河 means 'river'.
Means 'a bowl of rice.' 碗 means 'bowl'.
Means 'a plate of food.' 盘 means 'plate'.

hsk3.explanation: Means 'He is a bit fat.' 胖 means 'fat'.
Means 'This road is short.' 短 means 'short'.
Means 'His legs are long.' 腿 means 'leg'.
Means 'My feet are tired.' 脚 means 'foot'.
Means 'The child is crying.' 哭 means 'to cry'.
Means 'I write with a pen.' 笔 means 'pen'.
Means 'The horse is running.' 马 means 'horse'.

hsk3.explanation: Means 'The sky is blue.' 蓝 means 'blue'.
Means 'Today is a festival.' 节 means 'festival'.
Means 'This is my uncle.' 叔 means 'uncle'.

zhè shì zhǔ yào wèn tí.

hsk3.explanation: Means 'The water is full.' 满 means 'full'.
Means 'The clothes are dry.' 干 means 'dry'.
Means 'The cup is full.' 满 means 'full'.

hsk3.explanation: 澡 appears in 洗澡 (to bathe).

hsk3.meaning: to be used to (part of 习惯)
hsk3.explanation: 惯 appears in 习惯 (to be used to).
感 appears in 感觉 (to feel).
Means 'a pair of shoes.' 双 means 'pair'.
照 appears in 拍照 (take photo).

hsk3.meaning: but; so (part of 然而, 当然)

hsk3.example_pinyin: tā bèi lǎo shī pī píng.
hsk3.explanation: 被 is used in passive sentences.

hsk3.example_pinyin: dāng wǒ lái shí, tā zài jiā.

hsk3.explanation: Means 'The tree is tall.' 树 means 'tree'.
Means 'Please turn on the light.' 灯 means 'lamp'.
Means 'I carry a bag.' 提 means 'carry'.
成 appears in 成为 (to become).
Means 'A week has seven days.' 周 means 'week'.
条 is used for long objects (road, river, etc.).
Means 'The weather became cold.' 变 means 'change'.
根 means 'root' or measure word for long objects.
需 appears in 需要 (to need).
Means 'This road is straight.' 直 means 'straight'.
Means 'I have a bag.' 包 means 'bag'.
Means 'I sweep the floor.' 扫 means 'sweep'.
Means 'I bring an umbrella.' 伞 means 'umbrella'.
Means 'The room is clean.' 净 means 'clean'.
Means 'I brush my teeth.' 牙 means 'tooth'.
Means 'The bird is flying.' 鸟 means 'bird'.

hsk3.explanation: 目 means 'eye' and appears in 项目 (project).

Means 'I am afraid of dogs.' 怕 means 'fear'.
Means 'This building is tall.' 楼 means 'building'.
Means 'I don't drink alcohol.' 酒 means 'alcohol'.

Means 'The sound is loud.' 响 means 'sound/loud'.
